post.description:
Advance a case past intake. Blocked with 409 until required consent exists.

Document upload (MD 05) reuses ``ensure_case_consent`` so the same gate
protects uploads.

Provider status callback. Signature-verified; updates the step by
provider_ref. Not tenant-scoped (the provider has no tenant context); the
step itself carries the tenant.
